calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Koko Lay Kan, Appellant ,
Alexander Geyler, Respondent,

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo.

All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Aleksandr Geyler, Respondent, testifies on his own behalf.
Koko Lay Kan, Appellant testifies on his own behalf.

Vladmr Shpotnik testifies on behalf of the respondent.

Jam Branger testifies on behalf of the appellant
Gary Louie testifies on behalf of the appellant.

The Court accepts Appellants'as group exhibits (photographs, marked 1-6)

The Court accepts defendants'exhibits marked as A) Copy of photograph- side of house with bucket; B) Letter from Alex Geyler to Lay, Hla, dated March 11, 2014; C) Application for Building permit; D) SFPD Incident Report.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
The Court will order all exhibits returned upon ruling.

Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (502)
